creator: Lacoste_bo@yahoo.it
text:
@ Kubilay,

I have been downloading this one:

https://download.freebsd.org/ftp/releases/amd64/amd64/ISO-IMAGES/12.0/FreeBSD-12.0-RELEASE-amd64-dvd1.iso

and this one:

https://download.freebsd.org/ftp/releases/amd64/amd64/ISO-IMAGES/12.0/FreeBSD-12.0-RELEASE-amd64-memstick.img

getting the same result.

After that, I have been trying this one:

https://download.freebsd.org/ftp/releases/amd64/amd64/ISO-IMAGES/11.2/FreeBSD-11.2-RELEASE-amd64-memstick.img

it doesn't start a too.

Best Regards

Silvio
